info.title: Shopee Clone API
info.description: Documentation for Shopee Clone Modular Monolith REST APIs

tags.name: Chat
tags.description: Buyer-seller chat: REST room/message history; realtime delivery via STOMP /ws

tags.name: Payments
tags.description: Payment attempt initiation and buyer-facing payment status APIs

tags.name: Reviews
tags.description: Product review create/list/update APIs (delivered orders only)

tags.name: Recommendations
tags.description: AI-backed product recommendation APIs with deterministic fallback

tags.name: Search
tags.description: Keyword, facet and semantic product search APIs

tags.name: Media
tags.description: Media upload and asset management APIs

tags.name: Products
tags.description: Product categories, catalog, and seller product variant management APIs

tags.name: Notifications
tags.description: Notification inbox APIs (list, unread count, mark read)

tags.name: Inventory
tags.description: Seller and admin inventory management APIs

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Authentication APIs for users (Login, Register, Verify, Refresh, OAuth2, Logout)

tags.name: Seller Orders
tags.description: Seller-scoped order dashboard, detail and fulfillment APIs

tags.name: Buyer Orders
tags.description: Buyer-facing order list, detail and cancellation APIs

tags.name: Shops
tags.description: Shop registration and seller shop profile APIs

put.description: Updates an existing address by ID for the authenticated user.

delete.description: Deletes an address by ID for the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates one seller shop for the authenticated active user.
Transitions a paid READY_TO_SHIP order to SHIPPED using internal/mock shipping. Only the owning seller can ship.

404.description: Order not found in the caller's shop, or the caller has no shop.

409.description: Order is not paid or not in READY_TO_SHIP state.

post.description: Transitions a SHIPPED order to DELIVERED using internal/mock shipping. Only the owning seller can deliver.

404.description: Order not found in the caller's shop, or the caller has no shop.

409.description: Order is not in SHIPPED state.

post.summary: Create a review for a delivered order item
post.description: Only the buyer who owns the order can review, and only after the order is DELIVERED or COMPLETED. One review per order item.

404.description: Order item not found or not owned by the caller.

409.description: Order not reviewable yet, or item already reviewed.

post.description: Retrieves deterministic product cards using pgvector, then optionally asks Gemini via Spring AI for a grounded explanation. Generated text must not be parsed for commerce data.

get.description: Retrieves ACTIVE products for public catalog browsing.

post.description: Allows a seller to register a new product under their shop.
Adds a new unique SKU variant to an existing product.

400.description: Invalid request details or price format.

post.description: Transitions an ACTIVE seller product to INACTIVE.
Transitions a seller product from DRAFT or INACTIVE to ACTIVE when it has an active priced variant.

409.description: Product cannot be published in its current state.

422.description: Product has no active priced variant.

post.description: Verifies the HMAC-SHA512 signature before any processing, claims the provider event idempotently and settles the payment attempt. Duplicate events return 200 no-op.

200.description: Webhook acknowledged with a VNPay RspCode body.

post.description: Creates a payment attempt for the buyer's PENDING_PAYMENT checkout session. COD settles inventory and orders immediately; VNPAY returns a sandbox payment URL in nextAction. Only one non-terminal attempt may exist per session.

200.description: Payment attempt created or existing pending attempt returned.

404.description: Checkout session not found or not owned by the caller.

409.description: Session not payable, or another payment attempt is in progress.

post.description: Creates orders and reserve inventories based on current cart items.

400.description: Invalid request, missing idempotency key, or cart empty.

409.description: Idempotency key conflict, concurrent processing, or insufficient stock.

post.description: Returns per-item validation results and shipping fee breakdown for selected cart items. Does not reserve inventory.

400.description: No items selected, or no valid address found.

post.description: Idempotent: marking an already-read notification is a no-op.

404.description: Notification not found or not owned by the caller.

post.description: Uploads a product/avatar/shop-logo image. Validates MIME type via magic bytes (not Content-Type header), file extension (jpg/jpeg/png/webp) and configured size limit. Returns metadata with a public URL. For SHOP-owned media, ownerId must be a shop owned by the current user. For USER-owned media, ownerId must be the current user ID.

parameters.name: ownerId
parameters.description: Owner entity ID (shopId for PRODUCT_IMAGE / SHOP_LOGO)

file.description: The image file (jpg, jpeg, png, webp only)

400.description: Invalid file type, extension or file too large

post.description: Creates inventory for a specific product variant.

403.description: Shop owner or admin permission required.

409.description: Inventory already exists for this variant.

get.description: Rooms the caller participates in — as buyer, plus rooms of their own shop when seller.

post.summary: Open (or reuse) a chat room with a shop
post.description: One room per buyer+shop pair. Returns the existing room if already opened. A seller cannot open a room with their own shop.
Stamps the caller's last-read time on the room. Participants only.

403.description: Caller is not a participant of this room.

get.description: Paged message history, newest first. Participants only. Realtime messages are also broadcast to STOMP topic /topic/chat/rooms/{roomId}.

403.description: Caller is not a participant of this room.

post.description: Persists the message and broadcasts it to the room's STOMP topic. Participants only.

403.description: Caller is not a participant of this room.

post.summary: Add an item to the shopping cart
post.description: Adds a variant with specified quantity to the shopping cart.

400.description: Invalid request or quantity bounds exceeded.

post.description: Marks the given variant IDs as selected. Only variants already in the cart can be selected.

400.description: One or more variant IDs are not in the cart.

post.description: Removes the given variant IDs from the selected set.

post.summary: Cancel checkout session via any order in it
post.description: Cancels the entire checkout session that contains this order. All PENDING_PAYMENT orders in the session are cancelled and all reserved inventory is released. Any pending payment attempt for the session is expired so the VNPay redirect URL becomes invalid. Only allowed while the session is in PENDING_PAYMENT state. In a multi-shop checkout, cancelling one order cancels the whole session.

200.description: Checkout session and all its orders cancelled.

404.description: Order not found or not owned by the caller.

409.description: Checkout session is not in a cancellable state (already paid, expired, or cancelled).

post.description: Consumes a verification token atomically to verify and activate a user's account.

parameters.name: X-XSRF-TOKEN
parameters.description: CSRF token retrieved from the XSRF-TOKEN cookie

400.description: Invalid, expired, or already used email verification token.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded for verification attempts.

503.description: Database or verification service is down (fail-closed).

post.description: Registers a new user account and triggers verification email delivery.

parameters.name: X-XSRF-TOKEN
parameters.description: CSRF token retrieved from the XSRF-TOKEN cookie

400.description: Invalid input details (e.g. invalid email domain, short password).

429.description: Rate limit exceeded for registration attempts.

503.description: Database connection or rate limiting service is temporarily down (fail-closed).

post.description: Uses the refresh token cookie to rotate and issue a new access token and a rotated refresh token cookie.

parameters.name: X-XSRF-TOKEN
parameters.description: CSRF token retrieved from the XSRF-TOKEN cookie

401.description: Invalid, revoked, or expired refresh token. If a token reuse is detected, all tokens in the family are revoked.

403.description: CSRF token validation failed, or user account associated with this token is suspended/locked.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded for token refresh requests.

503.description: Redis blacklist or session database is temporarily down (fail-closed).

post.description: Exchanges a redirect one-time code for a JWT access token and sets a secure refresh token cookie.

parameters.name: X-XSRF-TOKEN
parameters.description: CSRF token retrieved from the XSRF-TOKEN cookie

Set-Cookie.description: Sets the __Secure-refresh_token cookie containing the refresh token

400.description: Invalid, expired, or already used exchange code.

403.description: CSRF token validation failed, or user account associated with OAuth identity is suspended/locked.

409.description: OAuth identity is already linked to another registered account.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded for OAuth2 code exchange attempts.

503.description: Redis or rate limiting service is temporarily unavailable (fail-closed).

post.description: Invalidates the current session's refresh token and blacklists the current access token. Bearer access token and refresh cookie are both optional at runtime to support idempotent retries.

parameters.name: X-XSRF-TOKEN
parameters.description: CSRF token retrieved from the XSRF-TOKEN cookie

parameters.name: __Secure-refresh_token
parameters.description: Opaque refresh token cookie to revoke (optional)

503.description: Redis blacklist is temporarily down. Returns 503 to trigger a client retry (fail-closed).

post.description: Invalidates all active sessions and refresh tokens for the authenticated user.

parameters.name: X-XSRF-TOKEN
parameters.description: CSRF token retrieved from the XSRF-TOKEN cookie

401.description: Authentication required or invalid JWT access token.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded for logout requests.

503.description: Session database or revocation service is down (fail-closed).

post.description: Authenticates a user with email and password, issuing an access token and setting a secure HttpOnly refresh token cookie.

parameters.name: X-XSRF-TOKEN
parameters.description: CSRF token retrieved from the XSRF-TOKEN cookie

Set-Cookie.description: Sets the __Secure-refresh_token cookie containing the refresh token

403.description: User email address is not verified, account is suspended/locked, or the CSRF token is invalid.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded for login attempts from this IP.

503.description: Rate limiting service or session store database is down (fail-closed).

get.description: Retrieves all addresses for the authenticated user, ordered with default first.

post.description: Creates a new address for the authenticated user.

get.description: Retrieves shop profile details for the authenticated user.

patch.description: Updates the shop profile details for the authenticated seller.
Updates rating/comment of a review owned by the authenticated buyer.

404.description: Review not found or not owned by the caller.

get.description: Retrieves public product detail for an ACTIVE product.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a seller product by setting status to DELETED.

patch.description: Allows a seller to modify basic description or category details of their product.
Updates pricing or details of an existing SKU variant.

400.description: Invalid request details or price format.

patch.description: Directly sets available stock for a specific product variant.

403.description: Shop owner or admin permission required.

delete.summary: Remove an item from the shopping cart
delete.description: Removes the specified product variant from the authenticated user's cart.

patch.description: Updates the quantity of an item in the cart. Set quantity to 0 to remove.

400.description: Invalid request or quantity bounds exceeded.

patch.description: Sets a specific address as default, overriding existing default.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's minimum profile and owned shop summary for client app chrome.
Retrieves public details of a shop by its unique ID.
Retrieves ACTIVE product cards owned by a seller shop.
Retrieves non-deleted seller products with status, media, variants and stock summary.

404.description: Current user does not own a shop.

get.description: Retrieves a non-deleted product owned by the authenticated seller.

get.summary: List orders of the current seller's shop
get.description: Paged list of orders scoped to the authenticated seller's shop, newest first. Optionally filtered by fulfillment status.

404.description: Caller does not own a shop.

get.description: Order detail with fulfillment-safe customer snapshot, item snapshots and payment info. Only orders of the caller's own shop are visible.

404.description: Order not found in the caller's shop, or the caller has no shop.

get.description: Product counts by status, order counts by fulfillment/payment state and the newest READY_TO_SHIP orders for the authenticated seller's shop.

404.description: Caller does not own a shop.

get.description: Searches ACTIVE products using Elasticsearch keyword/facet query. Falls back to PostgreSQL LIKE search when Elasticsearch is unavailable (response will contain degraded=true). Results are always revalidated against live DB state before returning.

200.description: Search results. degraded=true means ES was unavailable and results come from DB.

get.description: Embeds the query using Google Gemini text-embedding-004 and performs pgvector cosine similarity search over indexed product embeddings. Returns degraded=true when the AI provider is unavailable. Results are always revalidated against live product state.

200.description: Semantic search results. degraded=true means AI provider was unavailable.

get.description: Paged list of the authenticated buyer's own reviews, newest first.
Returns product cards with reason codes. Anonymous users receive deterministic trending recommendations; authenticated users also use cart signals and pgvector similarity when available.
Rating summary plus a page of reviews, newest first. No authentication required.
Returns newest ACTIVE products for homepage display. Deterministic — reads directly from PostgreSQL, never fails due to search or AI availability.

get.summary: Get payment status of a checkout session
get.description: Polling endpoint for payment return pages. Returns the latest attempt status, order IDs, next action and reconciliation reason if any.

404.description: Checkout session not found or not owned by the caller.

get.description: Redirects the buyer's browser to the frontend payment return page with the checkoutSessionId. Performs no state change — only the IPN webhook is authoritative.

302.description: Redirect to the frontend payment return page.

get.description: Paged inbox of the authenticated user, newest first.
Number of unread notifications for the authenticated user.
Returns metadata and public URL for a media asset. Does not serve raw bytes.
Serves raw media bytes for local/test storage public URLs.
Retrieves inventory details for a specific product variant.

403.description: Shop owner or admin permission required.

get.description: Paged audit ledger of stock movements for one variant, newest first. Only the owning seller or an admin can read it.

403.description: Shop owner or admin permission required.

get.description: Retrieves a list of all active categories.
Returns ACTIVE products in a category and all its subcategories. Sort options: NEWEST (default), PRICE_ASC, PRICE_DESC. Deterministic — reads from PostgreSQL, no ES or AI dependency.
Retrieves all items inside the shopping cart for the authenticated user.

delete.description: Clears all items inside the authenticated user's shopping cart.

get.description: Paged list of the authenticated buyer's orders, newest first.
Order detail with immutable address/item snapshots, payment info and timeline. Only the owning buyer can read it.

404.description: Order not found or not owned by the caller.

get.description: Retrieves the CSRF token and initializes the XSRF-TOKEN cookie.

Set-Cookie.description: Sets the XSRF-TOKEN cookie containing the CSRF token

429.description: Rate limit exceeded for CSRF token retrieval.

503.description: Security filters or system configuration services are unavailable.

AddressRequest.description: Request payload for creating or updating an address

userId.description: User unique ID owning the address

isDefault.description: Indicates if this is the default address

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the address was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the address was last updated

code.description: Business or HTTP code

message.description: Message description of the operation outcome

ApiResponseVoid.description: API response wrapper with no data payload

code.description: Business or HTTP code

message.description: Message description of the operation outcome

CreateShopRequest.description: Request payload for creating a seller shop

code.description: Business or HTTP code

message.description: Message description of the operation outcome

purpose.description: Intended usage of this media asset

objectKey.description: Unique object key in storage (not original filename)

width.description: Image width in pixels (null for non-image)

height.description: Image height in pixels (null for non-image)

ShopResponse.description: Response payload containing seller shop details

logo.description: Latest uploaded shop logo media, if any

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the shop profile was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the shop profile was last updated

code.description: Business error or HTTP status code

message.description: Description message of the operation outcome

data.description: Response data payload (omitted if null or on errors)

SellerOrderDetailResponse.description: Seller order detail with fulfillment-safe customer snapshot and item snapshots

fulfillmentStatus.description: Fulfillment status; null until the order is paid

shippingRecipientName.description: Recipient name from the immutable shipping snapshot

shippingPhone.description: Recipient phone from the immutable shipping snapshot

CreateReviewRequest.description: Payload for reviewing one delivered/completed order item

orderItemId.description: Order item to review (one review per order item)

code.description: Business error or HTTP status code

message.description: Description message of the operation outcome

data.description: Response data payload (omitted if null or on errors)

message.description: User shopping message. PII is sanitized before any AI prompt.
message.example: Find me a gaming mouse under 500k

limit.description: Maximum number of products to return

code.description: Business error or HTTP status code

message.description: Description message of the operation outcome

data.description: Response data payload (omitted if null or on errors)

ProductCardResponse.description: Lightweight product card for listing pages and search results. Only ACTIVE products are returned from public endpoints.

coverImageUrl.description: Public URL of the cover image (null if no cover)

coverMediaId.description: Cover media asset ID (null if no cover)

coverObjectKey.description: Object key of the cover image (null if no cover)

coverContentType.description: Cover media content type (null if no cover)

checkoutEligible.description: Whether at least one variant can be added to cart from this card

eligibilityIssues.description: Structured card-level publish or checkout eligibility issues

items.description: Seller-visible product publish or checkout eligibility issue
Recommended products. Commerce data is deterministic and comes from ProductCardResponse.

degraded.description: True when AI/vector retrieval failed and deterministic fallback was used

degradedReason.description: Reason for degraded mode, null when degraded=false

generatedText.description: Optional grounded AI explanation. Clients must not parse commerce data from this text.

RecommendedProductResponse.description: Product card plus deterministic recommendation reason codes

product.description: Hydrated product card. Client should render commerce data from this object only.

reasonCodes.description: Deterministic reason codes for this recommendation

items.description: Reason why a product was recommended

CreateProductRequest.description: Request payload for creating a product

description.example: The latest iPhone with titanium design

attributes.description: Flexible product attributes as key-value map

mediaIds.description: List of media asset IDs to attach to this product on creation

ProductResponse.description: Response payload containing product details along with variants

shopId.description: Shop unique ID where the product belongs

description.example: The latest iPhone with titanium design

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the product was last updated

ProductVariantResponse.description: Response payload containing product variant details

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the variant was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the variant was last updated

CreateProductVariantRequest.description: Request payload for creating a product variant

active.description: Whether this variant is active and eligible for checkout

ProductDetailResponse.description: Full product detail response for product detail page. Public endpoint only returns products with status=ACTIVE.

hasCover.description: Whether a cover image is attached

variants.description: Product variants with stock and checkout eligibility

eligibilityIssues.description: Structured seller-visible publish or checkout eligibility issues

items.description: Seller-visible product publish or checkout eligibility issue

totalAvailableStock.description: Total available stock across checkout-eligible variants

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the product was last updated

ProductMediaSummary.description: Summary of a product media attachment

publicUrl.description: Public URL of the media asset

cover.description: Whether this is the cover/primary image

ProductVariantDetailResponse.description: Detailed variant response with stock and checkout eligibility

checkoutEligible.description: Whether this variant can be added to cart (active + positive price + in stock)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the variant was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the variant was last updated

ShopSummaryDto.description: Compact shop summary embedded in product responses

InitiatePaymentRequest.description: Payload for initiating a payment attempt on a checkout session

code.description: Business error or HTTP status code

message.description: Description message of the operation outcome

data.description: Response data payload (omitted if null or on errors)

PaymentStatusResponse.description: Buyer-facing payment status for return pages and polling

paymentAttemptId.description: Latest payment attempt ID; null when no attempt exists yet

status.description: Latest payment attempt status; NONE when no attempt exists

orderIds.description: Order IDs created by the checkout session

nextAction.description: Next action for the client: a payment URL for pending online payments, otherwise null

expiresAt.description: Expiry of the latest payment attempt

reconciliationReason.description: Reason the attempt requires manual reconciliation, if any

CheckoutRequest.description: Payload for order checkout creation request

addressId.description: Address ID to use for shipping. If null, the user's default address will be used.

code.description: HTTP code

message.description: Message description

CheckoutResponse.description: Response payload after successful checkout reservation

checkoutSessionId.description: ID of the created checkout session

CheckoutPreviewRequest.description: Request for checkout cost preview without reserving inventory

addressId.description: Address ID for shipping cost estimate. If null, the user's default address is used.

code.description: HTTP code

message.description: Message description

CheckoutPreviewItemResult.description: Per-item validation result in checkout preview

valid.description: Whether this item passes all checkout validations

CheckoutPreviewResponse.description: Full cost breakdown for selected cart items — no inventory reserved

invalidItems.description: Invalid items whose shop could not be resolved (variant or product inactive); always carry valid=false and an invalidReasonCode

allItemsValid.description: True only when every item in every shop is valid

cartVersion.description: Cart version at time of preview — include in POST /api/orders to detect cart drift

itemsSubtotal.description: Sum of item totals for this shop

shippingFee.description: Estimated shipping fee for this shop

code.description: Business error or HTTP status code

message.description: Description message of the operation outcome

data.description: Response data payload (omitted if null or on errors)
